item.title: Judge rejects Trump administration's effort to obtain Michigan voter data
item.description: The Trump administration has filed lawsuits against 24 states in an effort to obtain their voter rolls.

item.title: Airlines adjust as Trump's policies dry up Cuba's jet fuel supplies
item.description: A Canadian airline suspends flights to Cuba as U.S sanctions and Trump's tariff threats force Havana to warn carriers there's no way to refuel on the ...

item.title: Ben Ogden becomes 1st U.S. man in 50 years to medal in cross-country
item.description: Ben Ogden of Team USA won the silver medal in the cross-country sprint Tuesday at the Winter Olympics in Italy.

item.title: How much gold is in an Olympic gold medal, and how much is it worth?
item.description: Olympic medals have what's known as a "melt value." But they're worth far more financially than their mineral contents, an auction expert notes.

item.title: See the Olympic medal count for the 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Here is a look at where the medal count stands for Team USA and other nations as the competition heats up at the 2026 Winter Olympics.
